_about: Per-repo doc-enforcement markers for doc-update-enforcer.py (PostToolUse) and blocking-doc-enforcer.py (PreToolUse git-commit gate). Extracted from the two hooks in P4-T4 so doc enforcement works in ANY repo, not just GO_UDP. The DEFAULTS below are byte-identical to the values the hooks previously hardcoded — GO_UDP behavior is unchanged. Edit these to point at another repo's doc layout.
